Name: ActionCardinalityBehavior
Title: Action Cardinality Behavior
Description: Defines behavior for an action or a group for how many times that item may be repeated.

Name: ActionConditionKind
Title: Action Condition Kind
Description: Defines the kinds of conditions that can appear on actions.

Name: ActionGroupingBehavior
Title: Action Grouping Behavior
Description: Defines organization behavior of a group.

Name: ActionParticipantType
Title: Action Participant Type
Description: The type of participant for the action.

Name: ActionPrecheckBehavior
Title: Action Precheck Behavior
Description: Defines selection frequency behavior for an action or group.

Name: ActionRelationshipType
Title: Action Relationship Type
Description: Defines the types of relationships between actions.

Name: ActionRequiredBehavior
Title: Action Required Behavior
Description: Defines expectations around whether an action or action group is required.

Name: ActionSelectionBehavior
Title: Action Selection Behavior
Description: Defines selection behavior of a group.

Name: ObservationStatus
Title: Observation Status
Description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

Name: PublicationStatus
Title: PublicationStatus
Description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.

Name: RequestIntent
Title: RequestIntent
Description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

Name: RequestPriority
Title: RequestPriority
Description: Identifies the level of importance to be assigned to actioning the request.

Name: RequestStatus
Title: RequestStatus
Description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

Name: ResourceType
Title: ResourceType
Description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

Name: TreatmentLineCS
Title: Treatment Line Code System
Description: Ordinal codes representing the line of systemic anti-cancer therapy. These codes are used in the TreatmentLineVS value set and on the LineOfTherapyObservation and regimen profiles.  **mCODE Migration Candidate** — These codes are proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5 or as a SNOMED CT extension request. Once standard codes are available, this code system should be deprecated.

Name: LOINC
Title: Logical Observation Identifiers
Description: Names and Codes (LOINC)
Used: LOINC provides a set of universal names and ID codes for identifying laboratory and clinical test results.1,2 LOINC facilitates the exchange and pooling of results, such as blood hemoglobin, serum potassium, or vital signs, for clinical care, outcomes management, and research. LOINC's universal identifiers (names and codes) can be used in the context of order and observation exchanges between information systems that use syntax standards such as HL73, CEN TC251, ISO TC215, ASTM4, and DICOM. Specifically, the identifier can be used as the coded value for an observation in any other standard that uses the observation/observation value paradigm, whether messages, documents, application programming interface (API), etc. For example, LOINC codes are used widely in the OBX segment Observation Identifier field (OBX-3) of an ORU HL7 (HL7 version 2.x or ASTM 1238-9410) message that may be sent between a Clinical Laboratory Information Management Systems (LIMS) and Electronic Health Record Systems (EHR).5, 6 In this way, LOINC codes provide universal identifiers that allow the exchange of clinical data between heterogeneous computing environments.

Name: SNOMED_CT
Title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
Description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).

Name: ActionType
Title: ActionType
Description: The type of action to be performed.

Name: DataAbsentReason
Title: DataAbsentReason
Description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

Name: DefinitionTopic
Title: DefinitionTopic
Description: High-level categorization of the definition, used for searching, sorting, and filtering.

Name: GoalCategory
Title: Goal category
Description: Codes for grouping goals to use for filtering or presentation.

Name: GoalPriority
Title: Goal priority
Description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

Name: LibraryType
Title: LibraryType
Description: The type of knowledge asset this library contains.

Name: ObservationCategoryCodes
Title: Observation Category Codes
Description: Observation Category codes.

Name: PlanDefinitionType
Title: PlanDefinitionType
Description: The type of PlanDefinition.

Name: ObservationReferenceRangeMeaningCodes
Title: Observation Reference Range Meaning Codes
Description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the meaning/use of a reference range for a particular target population.

Name: ObservationInterpretation
Title: ObservationInterpretation
Description: One or more codes providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation, such as "normal" / "abnormal", "low" / "high", "better" / "worse", "resistant" / "susceptible", "expected" / "not expected". The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.

Name: Ietf3066
Title: Tags for the Identification of Languages
Description: Older value from OID registry.  Superceded; see recommendations in BCP-47.

Name: ISO3166Part1
Title: ISO 3166-1 Codes for the representation of names of countries and their subdivisions — Part 1: Country code
Description: ISO 3166-1 establishes codes that represent the current names of countries, dependencies, and other areas of particular geopolitical interest, on the basis of country names obtained from the United Nations.

Name: ISO3166Part2
Title: ISO 3166-2 Codes for the representation of names of countries and their subdivisions — Part 2: Country subdivision code
Description: ISO 3166-2 establishes a code that represents the names of the principal administrative divisions, or similar areas, of the countries and entities included in ISO 3166-1.
